description: Extended low-yield-first interview to 15 turns (turns 1-10 identical to low_yield_first_10turn). Tests whether V17 dynamics continue to evolve well past the demonstration window.
source: Phase 2 plan §8.2 Condition B + extension for long-conversation stability test.
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you tell me about your past medical history?
Do you live alone or with someone?
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
What medications do you usually take?
Has anything like this happened to you before?
Do you have any allergies I should know about?
Have you traveled recently or been around anyone sick?
Is there anything else you would like to tell me about how you are feeling?
Have you been able to eat or drink today?
Are you having any new sensations or changes since you arrived?
Has the way you feel changed at all since we started talking?
Is there anyone we should call for you?
Is there anything else you want me to know before we move on?
